message:
chore(vc_cli): adapt duck_value_to_sqlite_value to SqliteValue Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> shape; promote tokio + futures to runtime deps

Two related changes that ride on the same Cargo.lock refresh.

## SqliteValue payload shape adaptation

The fsqlite-types upgrade moved `SqliteValue::Text` from
`SqliteValue::Text(String)` to `SqliteValue::Text(Arc<str>)` and
`SqliteValue::Blob` from `SqliteValue::Blob(Vec<u8>)` to
`SqliteValue::Blob(Arc<[u8]>)` to enable cheap cloning of frequently-
duplicated values across the storage layer.

`duck_value_to_sqlite_value` was producing the old shapes. Adapt
every constructor:

- `DuckValue::Text(text) => SqliteValue::Text(text)` →
  `SqliteValue::Text(text.into())` (String → Arc<str>)
- `DuckValue::Blob(bytes) => SqliteValue::Blob(bytes)` →
  `SqliteValue::Blob(Arc::from(bytes.as_slice()))`
- All the `format_*` / `to_string` text producers gain a trailing
  `.into()` so the produced `String` becomes `Arc<str>`.
- The Interval and complex-aggregate branches construct an `Arc<str>`
  via `.to_string().into()`.
- The is_text_json normalization tail uses the same `.to_string()
  .into()` shape.

The semantic output is unchanged — same UTF-8 bytes, same JSON
encoding. Only the in-memory representation shifted from owned
String/Vec to reference-counted Arc.

## tokio + futures promoted to runtime deps

The vc_cli crate previously had `futures.workspace = true` only under
`[dev-dependencies]`. A new code path in `vc_cli::lib::*` that
consumes async DuckDB / fsqlite results requires both `tokio` and
`futures` at runtime, so move them into `[dependencies]`:

- `tokio.workspace = true` (newly added)
- `futures.workspace = true` (moved up from dev-dependencies)

Cargo.lock picks up the corresponding `vc_cli → tokio` edge so a
fresh build resolves the same graph deterministically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,9 +33,10 @@ uuid.workspace = true
 anyhow.workspace = true
 duckdb.workspace = true
 fsqlite.workspace = true
+tokio.workspace = true
+futures.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest.workspace = true
 mockall.workspace = true
-futures.workspace = true
 tempfile = "3"

@@ -4397,15 +4397,17 @@ fn duck_value_to_sqlite_value(
         DuckValue::UInt(number) => SqliteValue::Integer(i64::from(number)),
         DuckValue::Float(number) => SqliteValue::Float(f64::from(number)),
         DuckValue::Double(number) => SqliteValue::Float(number),
-        DuckValue::Text(text) => SqliteValue::Text(text),
-        DuckValue::Blob(bytes) => SqliteValue::Blob(bytes),
-        DuckValue::Timestamp(unit, value) => SqliteValue::Text(format_timestamp(unit, value)?),
-        DuckValue::Date32(days) => SqliteValue::Text(format_date(days)?),
-        DuckValue::Time64(unit, value) => SqliteValue::Text(format_time(unit, value)),
-        DuckValue::HugeInt(number) => SqliteValue::Text(number.to_string()),
-        DuckValue::UBigInt(number) => SqliteValue::Text(number.to_string()),
-        DuckValue::Decimal(decimal) => SqliteValue::Text(decimal.normalize().to_string()),
-        DuckValue::Enum(value) => SqliteValue::Text(value),
+        DuckValue::Text(text) => SqliteValue::Text(text.into()),
+        DuckValue::Blob(bytes) => SqliteValue::Blob(Arc::from(bytes.as_slice())),
+        DuckValue::Timestamp(unit, value) => {
+            SqliteValue::Text(format_timestamp(unit, value)?.into())
+        }
+        DuckValue::Date32(days) => SqliteValue::Text(format_date(days)?.into()),
+        DuckValue::Time64(unit, value) => SqliteValue::Text(format_time(unit, value).into()),
+        DuckValue::HugeInt(number) => SqliteValue::Text(number.to_string().into()),
+        DuckValue::UBigInt(number) => SqliteValue::Text(number.to_string().into()),
+        DuckValue::Decimal(decimal) => SqliteValue::Text(decimal.normalize().to_string().into()),
+        DuckValue::Enum(value) => SqliteValue::Text(value.into()),
         DuckValue::Interval {
             months,
             days,
@@ -4416,20 +4418,25 @@ fn duck_value_to_sqlite_value(
                 "days": days,
                 "nanos": nanos,
             })
-            .to_string(),
+            .to_string()
+            .into(),
         ),
         complex @ (DuckValue::List(_)
         | DuckValue::Array(_)
         | DuckValue::Struct(_)
         | DuckValue::Map(_)
-        | DuckValue::Union(_)) => SqliteValue::Text(duck_value_to_json(complex)?.to_string()),
+        | DuckValue::Union(_)) => {
+            SqliteValue::Text(duck_value_to_json(complex)?.to_string().into())
+        }
     };
 
     if is_text_json_type(&normalized_type)
         && !matches!(&sqlite_value, SqliteValue::Null | SqliteValue::Text(_))
     {
         return Ok(SqliteValue::Text(
-            sqlite_value_to_normalized_json(&sqlite_value, source_type)?.to_string(),
+            sqlite_value_to_normalized_json(&sqlite_value, source_type)?
+                .to_string()
+                .into(),
         ));
     }
     Ok(sqlite_value)
